sql.trim: t1.CREATED_BY, t1.JOIN_MEET_ORG, t1.MEET_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.MEET_PLACE, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.MEET_NAME, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.JOIN_PEOPLE, t1.VERSION, t1.ID, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.MEET_TYPE, t1.MEET_OUTLINE, t1.HOURS_RECORD_YN, t1.LEARN_HOURS, t1.MEET_THEME, t1.DUE_PEOPLE_NUM, t1.ACTUAL_PEOPLE_NUM, t1.LEAVE_PEOPLE_NUM, t1.JOIN_MEET_RATE, t1.LEAVE_PEOPLE, t1.SPEAKER, t1.LECTURER, t1.HOST_TAKER, t1.NOTE_TAKER, t1.MEET_RESULT, t1.REMARKS, t1.JOIN_ORG, t1.JOIN_PEOPLE_NEW, t1.JOIN_ORG_ID, t1.JOIN_PEOPLE_ID, t1.SECRET_LEVEL, t1.SPEAKER_OUT_YN, t1.LECTURER_OUT_YN, t1.HOST_TAKER_OUT_YN, t1.NOTE_TAKER_OUT_YN, t1.LEAVE_PEOPLE_NEW, t1.LEAVEL_PEOPLE, t1.REQUEST_USER, t1.PARTY_NAME, t1.PARTY_ID, t1.AUTO_CODE, t1.PARTY_NAME_NEW, t1.REQUEST_TEL, t1.PARTY_TYPE, t1.LX_POSEN, t1.MEET_ZJ,

mapper.select:
select
from DYN_THREE_FOUR t1
and t1.id in
#{item}
order by t1.creation_date desc
mapper.insert:
insert into DYN_THREE_FOUR
CREATED_BY,
JOIN_MEET_ORG,
MEET_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
MEET_PLACE,
CREATION_DATE,
MEET_NAME,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
JOIN_PEOPLE,
VERSION,
ID,
CREATED_DEPT,
ORG_IDENTITY,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
MEET_TYPE,
MEET_OUTLINE,
HOURS_RECORD_YN,
LEARN_HOURS,
MEET_THEME,
DUE_PEOPLE_NUM,
ACTUAL_PEOPLE_NUM,
LEAVE_PEOPLE_NUM,
JOIN_MEET_RATE,
LEAVE_PEOPLE,
SPEAKER,
LECTURER,
HOST_TAKER,
NOTE_TAKER,
MEET_RESULT,
REMARKS,
JOIN_ORG,
JOIN_PEOPLE_NEW,
JOIN_ORG_ID,
JOIN_PEOPLE_ID,
SECRET_LEVEL,
SPEAKER_OUT_YN,
LECTURER_OUT_YN,
HOST_TAKER_OUT_YN,
NOTE_TAKER_OUT_YN,
LEAVE_PEOPLE_NEW,
LEAVEL_PEOPLE,
REQUEST_USER,
PARTY_NAME,
PARTY_ID,
AUTO_CODE,
PARTY_NAME_NEW,
REQUEST_TEL,
PARTY_TYPE,
LX_POSEN,
MEET_ZJ,
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{joinMeetOrg,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{meetDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{meetPlace,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{meetName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{joinPeople,jdbcType = CLOB},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{meetType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{meetOutline,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{hoursRecordYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{learnHours,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{meetTheme,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{duePeopleNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{actualPeopleNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{leavePeopleNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{joinMeetRate,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{leavePeople,jdbcType = CLOB},
#{speaker,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lecturer,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{hostTaker,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{noteTaker,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{meetResult,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{remarks,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{joinOrg,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{joinPeopleNew,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{joinOrgId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{joinPeopleId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{speakerOutYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lecturerOutYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{hostTakerOutYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{noteTakerOutYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{leavePeopleNew,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{leavelPeople,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{requestUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{autoCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyNameNew,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{requestTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lxPosen,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{meetZj,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

insert into DYN_THREE_FOUR( CREATED_BY , JOIN_MEET_ORG , MEET_DATE , LAST_UPDATED_BY , MEET_PLACE , CREATION_DATE , MEET_NAME , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , JOIN_PEOPLE , VERSION , ID , CREATED_DEPT , ORG_IDENTITY , LAST_UPDATE_IP , MEET_TYPE , MEET_OUTLINE , HOURS_RECORD_YN , LEARN_HOURS , MEET_THEME , DUE_PEOPLE_NUM , ACTUAL_PEOPLE_NUM , LEAVE_PEOPLE_NUM , JOIN_MEET_RATE , LEAVE_PEOPLE , SPEAKER , LECTURER , HOST_TAKER , NOTE_TAKER , MEET_RESULT , REMARKS , JOIN_ORG , JOIN_PEOPLE_NEW , JOIN_ORG_ID , JOIN_PEOPLE_ID , SECRET_LEVEL , SPEAKER_OUT_YN , LECTURER_OUT_YN , HOST_TAKER_OUT_YN , NOTE_TAKER_OUT_YN , LEAVE_PEOPLE_NEW , LEAVEL_PEOPLE , REQUEST_USER , PARTY_NAME , PARTY_ID , AUTO_CODE , PARTY_NAME_NEW , REQUEST_TEL , PARTY_TYPE , LX_POSEN , MEET_ZJ )
select #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.joinMeetOrg,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.meetDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.meetPlace,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.meetName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.joinPeople,jdbcType = CLOB} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.meetType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.meetOutline,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.hoursRecordYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.learnHours,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.meetTheme,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.duePeopleNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.actualPeopleNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.leavePeopleNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.joinMeetRate,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.leavePeople,jdbcType = CLOB} , #{item.speaker,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lecturer,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.hostTaker,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.noteTaker,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.meetResult,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.remarks,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.joinOrg,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.joinPeopleNew,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.joinOrgId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.joinPeopleId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.speakerOutYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lecturerOutYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.hostTakerOutYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.noteTakerOutYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.leavePeopleNew,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.leavelPeople,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.requestUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.autoCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyNameNew,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.requestTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lxPosen,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.meetZj,jdbcType = VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update DYN_THREE_FOUR
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
JOIN_MEET_ORG = #{joinMeetOrg,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
MEET_DATE = #{meetDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
MEET_PLACE = #{meetPlace,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
MEET_NAME = #{meetName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
JOIN_PEOPLE = #{joinPeople,jdbcType = CLOB},
VERSION = version+1,
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
MEET_TYPE = #{meetType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
MEET_OUTLINE = #{meetOutline,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
HOURS_RECORD_YN = #{hoursRecordYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LEARN_HOURS = #{learnHours,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
MEET_THEME = #{meetTheme,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DUE_PEOPLE_NUM = #{duePeopleNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
ACTUAL_PEOPLE_NUM = #{actualPeopleNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
LEAVE_PEOPLE_NUM = #{leavePeopleNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
JOIN_MEET_RATE = #{joinMeetRate,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
LEAVE_PEOPLE = #{leavePeople,jdbcType = CLOB},
SPEAKER = #{speaker,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LECTURER = #{lecturer,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
HOST_TAKER = #{hostTaker,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
NOTE_TAKER = #{noteTaker,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
MEET_RESULT = #{meetResult,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
REMARKS = #{remarks,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
JOIN_ORG = #{joinOrg,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
JOIN_PEOPLE_NEW = #{joinPeopleNew,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
JOIN_ORG_ID = #{joinOrgId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
JOIN_PEOPLE_ID = #{joinPeopleId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
SECRET_LEVEL = #{secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
SPEAKER_OUT_YN = #{speakerOutYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LECTURER_OUT_YN = #{lecturerOutYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
HOST_TAKER_OUT_YN = #{hostTakerOutYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
NOTE_TAKER_OUT_YN = #{noteTakerOutYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LEAVE_PEOPLE_NEW = #{leavePeopleNew,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LEAVEL_PEOPLE = #{leavelPeople,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
REQUEST_USER = #{requestUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_NAME = #{partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_ID = #{partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
AUTO_CODE = #{autoCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_NAME_NEW = #{partyNameNew,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
REQUEST_TEL = #{requestTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_TYPE = #{partyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LX_POSEN = #{lxPosen,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
MEET_ZJ = #{meetZj,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update DYN_THREE_FOUR set CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JOIN_MEET_ORG = #{joinMeetOrg,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MEET_DATE = #{meetDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MEET_PLACE = #{meetPlace,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , MEET_NAME = #{meetName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , JOIN_PEOPLE = #{joinPeople,jdbcType = CLOB} , VERSION = version+1 , ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MEET_TYPE = #{meetType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MEET_OUTLINE = #{meetOutline,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , HOURS_RECORD_YN = #{hoursRecordYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LEARN_HOURS = #{learnHours,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , MEET_THEME = #{meetTheme,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DUE_PEOPLE_NUM = #{duePeopleNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , ACTUAL_PEOPLE_NUM = #{actualPeopleNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , LEAVE_PEOPLE_NUM = #{leavePeopleNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , JOIN_MEET_RATE = #{joinMeetRate,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , LEAVE_PEOPLE = #{leavePeople,jdbcType = CLOB} , SPEAKER = #{speaker,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LECTURER = #{lecturer,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , HOST_TAKER = #{hostTaker,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , NOTE_TAKER = #{noteTaker,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MEET_RESULT = #{meetResult,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , REMARKS = #{remarks,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JOIN_ORG = #{joinOrg,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JOIN_PEOPLE_NEW = #{joinPeopleNew,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JOIN_ORG_ID = #{joinOrgId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JOIN_PEOPLE_ID = #{joinPeopleId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SECRET_LEVEL = #{secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SPEAKER_OUT_YN = #{speakerOutYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LECTURER_OUT_YN = #{lecturerOutYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , HOST_TAKER_OUT_YN = #{hostTakerOutYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , NOTE_TAKER_OUT_YN = #{noteTakerOutYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LEAVE_PEOPLE_NEW = #{leavePeopleNew,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LEAVEL_PEOPLE = #{leavelPeople,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , REQUEST_USER = #{requestUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_NAME = #{partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_ID = #{partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , AUTO_CODE = #{autoCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_NAME_NEW = #{partyNameNew,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , REQUEST_TEL = #{requestTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_TYPE = #{partyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LX_POSEN = #{lxPosen,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MEET_ZJ = #{meetZj,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update DYN_THREE_FOUR set CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JOIN_MEET_ORG = #{item.joinMeetOrg,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MEET_DATE = #{item.meetDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MEET_PLACE = #{item.meetPlace,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , MEET_NAME = #{item.meetName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , JOIN_PEOPLE = #{item.joinPeople,jdbcType = CLOB} , VERSION = version+1 , ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MEET_TYPE = #{item.meetType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MEET_OUTLINE = #{item.meetOutline,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , HOURS_RECORD_YN = #{item.hoursRecordYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LEARN_HOURS = #{item.learnHours,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , MEET_THEME = #{item.meetTheme,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DUE_PEOPLE_NUM = #{item.duePeopleNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , ACTUAL_PEOPLE_NUM = #{item.actualPeopleNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , LEAVE_PEOPLE_NUM = #{item.leavePeopleNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , JOIN_MEET_RATE = #{item.joinMeetRate,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , LEAVE_PEOPLE = #{item.leavePeople,jdbcType = CLOB} , SPEAKER = #{item.speaker,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LECTURER = #{item.lecturer,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , HOST_TAKER = #{item.hostTaker,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , NOTE_TAKER = #{item.noteTaker,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MEET_RESULT = #{item.meetResult,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , REMARKS = #{item.remarks,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JOIN_ORG = #{item.joinOrg,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JOIN_PEOPLE_NEW = #{item.joinPeopleNew,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JOIN_ORG_ID = #{item.joinOrgId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JOIN_PEOPLE_ID = #{item.joinPeopleId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SECRET_LEVEL = #{item.secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SPEAKER_OUT_YN = #{item.speakerOutYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LECTURER_OUT_YN = #{item.lecturerOutYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , HOST_TAKER_OUT_YN = #{item.hostTakerOutYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , NOTE_TAKER_OUT_YN = #{item.noteTakerOutYn,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LEAVE_PEOPLE_NEW = #{item.leavePeopleNew,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LEAVEL_PEOPLE = #{item.leavelPeople,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , REQUEST_USER = #{item.requestUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_NAME = #{item.partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_ID = #{item.partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , AUTO_CODE = #{item.autoCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_NAME_NEW = #{item.partyNameNew,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , REQUEST_TEL = #{item.requestTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_TYPE = #{item.partyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LX_POSEN = #{item.lxPosen,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MEET_ZJ = #{item.meetZj,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}
